summary: Applied the staged environment lane from mainline commit 8fab10a6 by converging the staging bridge, fixing the Proxmox API automation role, creating VMIDs 220 and 240 on vmbr20, and verifying both staged guests over SSH through the Proxmox jump.

verification.check: Staging bridge and Proxmox API role converge
verification.observed: `make configure-staging-bridge` left `vmbr20` active on `10.20.10.1/24`, and `make provision-api-access` created the custom `LV3Automation` role plus updated the user and token ACLs on `/` so staged OpenTofu VM creation could proceed on Proxmox VE 9.

verification.check: Reviewed staging plan and live apply
verification.observed: `RUN_ID=adr0183-staging-live-20260327 make remote-tofu-plan ENV=staging` produced a create-only plan for VMIDs `220` and `240`, and the reviewed plan was applied successfully on `docker-build-lv3` after repairing ownership on the session-scoped plan directory.

After converging the staged VM NICs to `firewall=0`, both `docker-runtime-staging-lv3` and `monitoring-staging-lv3` responded to host ping on `10.20.10.20` and `10.20.10.40`, and both accepted SSH as `ops` through the Proxmox jump path.

`ANSIBLE_HOST_KEY_CHECKING=False ansible-playbook -i inventory/hosts.yml playbooks/services/grafana.yml --private-key /Users/live/Documents/GITHUB_PROJECTS/proxmox_florin_server/.local/ssh/hetzner_llm_agents_ed25519 -e env=staging -e proxmox_guest_ssh_connection_mode=proxmox_host_jump --syntax-check` passed from the same mainline worktree; `python scripts/integration_suite.py --mode gate --environment staging` returned a structured `skipped` result because no staged service bindings are active yet.

notes: The stock `make remote-tofu-apply ENV=staging` wrapper still hit the known build-server session-runtime ownership bug after the reviewed plan was saved; the successful live apply repaired ownership under `.local/runs/adr0183-staging-live-20260327/tofu` and replayed `scripts/tofu_exec.sh apply staging` directly on `docker-build-lv3`.

The first successful staged guest reachability required changing the staged VM NICs to `firewall=0`. Repository version `0.177.12` codifies that staged default until staged guest-network-policy automation exists.

The Proxmox API token verification step inside `make provision-api-access` still timed out against `https://proxmox.lv3.org:8006/api2/json/version` from the controller, even though the role and ACL convergence succeeded live and the staged OpenTofu apply proved the token had the needed privileges.

At receipt time, the staged guests were reachable over SSH but the QEMU guest agent still was not responding on VMIDs `220` and `240`, so the OpenTofu provider finished with agent-timeout warnings instead of guest-agent-published interface data.
